sourceMovie.title: Legion
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Legion works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Constantine
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Legion clicked for you, Constantine (2005) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and fantasy, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Vampires
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Legion clicked for you, Vampires (1998) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and fantasy, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Legion clicked for you, The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones (2013) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and fantasy, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Howl's Moving Castle
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Legion clicked for you, Howl's Moving Castle (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy, with earned warmth without mush. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Legion?
faq.answer: Try Constantine, Vampires, The Mortal Instruments: City of Bones—each shares DNA with Legion while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Legion?
faq.answer: Legion (2010) is best described as Action, Fantasy, Horror. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Legion worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 5.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
